title: [W]Postcode where the claimant worked
h1: [W]What's the postcode where the claimant worked?
p1: [W]This will usually decide which Employment Tribunal office deals with your claim. If you worked at home, enter the home postcode at which you work or worked.
p2: [W]If the claimant is claiming against someone they did not work for, enter the postcode of where they are based.
